sprints.title: AgentForge v4.8 — Data-Driven Dashboard & Organizational Scale

items.title: New API Endpoints for All Sections
items.description: Add missing endpoints: /api/v1/org-graph, /api/v1/bus-events, /api/v1/flywheel, /api/v1/delegations, /api/v1/sprints, /api/v1/reviews, /api/v1/autonomy, /api/v1/capabilities, /api/v1/meetings, /api/v1/memory, /api/v1/reforge. Each returns real data. Standard envelope: { data, meta }.

items.title: Agent Cards — Live Data
items.description: Read from /api/v1/agents. Real agent count, model tiers, session stats, cost. Remove all hardcoded agent data.

items.title: Session Timeline — Live Data
items.description: Read from /api/v1/sessions. Real timestamps, agents, status. Filterable, paginated.

items.title: Cost Analytics — Live Data
items.description: Read from /api/v1/costs. Real spend by model, agent, day. SVG charts from real numbers.

items.title: Session History Table — Live Data
items.description: Full session history from /api/v1/sessions. Sortable, filterable, paginated, drill-down.

items.title: Activity Feed — Live Data
items.description: Activity feed via SSE /api/v1/stream. Replace hardcoded task rows. Live updates.

items.title: Org Graph — Complete Redesign
items.description: CEO-directed redesign: top-down tree layout (Reingold-Tilford), full node labels (no truncation), team color coding (opus=gold, sonnet=blue, haiku=green), collapsible subtrees with +/- buttons, clean elbow connectors, default zoomed to C-suite+VP (depth 2), pannable/zoomable SVG canvas. Reads from /api/v1/org-graph.

items.title: Sprint Tracker — Live Data
items.description: Read from /api/v1/sprints. Real items, assignees, progress. Fix the v4.4 label.

items.title: Version Badge Update
items.description: Version badge reads from /api/v1/health. Auto-updates. Never hardcoded again.

items.title: SPA Routing
items.description: History API routing. Routes: /, /runs, /runs/:id, /agents/:id, /cost, /org, /sprints. Server catch-all returns index.html.

items.title: Org Restructure — YAML Definitions
items.description: Create all 16 new agent YAML files. Update delegation.yaml and models.yaml for 6-team org.

items.title: Write v4.8 Sprint JSON
items.description: This file. Sprint tracker reads this in real-time.

items.title: Delegation Flow — Live Data
items.description: Read from /api/v1/delegations. Real delegation chains, depths, agent-to-agent paths.

items.title: Flywheel Metrics — Live Data
items.description: Read from /api/v1/flywheel. Real improvement scores, feedback loop counts, promotion history.

items.title: Bus Monitor — Live Data
items.description: Read from /api/v1/bus-events and SSE stream. Real event types, frequencies, latencies.

items.title: Autonomy Tiers — Live Data
items.description: Read from /api/v1/autonomy. Real tier assignments, promotion history, success rates.

items.title: Capability Matrix — Live Data
items.description: Read from /api/v1/capabilities. Real agent skills, domain assignments.

items.title: Review Pipeline — Live Data
items.description: Read from /api/v1/reviews. Real REFORGE proposals, review status, approval rates.

items.title: Investor Scorecard — Live Data
items.description: Read from /api/v1/costs + /api/v1/sessions. Real ROI metrics: cost-per-feature, velocity trend, budget burn rate.

items.title: Memory Browser — Live Data
items.description: Read from /api/v1/memory. Browse memory entries, search, filter by agent.

items.title: REFORGE Panel — Live Data
items.description: Read from /api/v1/reforge. Show proposals, status, execution history.

items.title: Meeting Schedule — Live Data
items.description: Read from /api/v1/meetings. Show scheduled reviews, retros, planning sessions.

items.title: SSE Replace All Polling
items.description: Remove every setInterval and Refreshing in Ns text. All live updates via EventSource.

items.title: Loading Skeletons and Error States
items.description: Every section gets skeleton loader, empty state, error state with retry. No placeholder fallbacks.

items.title: Backend Test Suite — 150+ Tests
items.description: Test all new API endpoints, SSE events, data transforms.

items.title: Frontend Test Suite — 100+ Tests
items.description: Test all section data binding, SPA routing, SSE reconnection, error states.

items.title: Enterprise UI Theme System
items.description: Dark/light mode, responsive grid, print stylesheet, consistent design tokens.

items.title: Dashboard Performance Optimization
items.description: Lazy-load below-fold sections. Virtualized tables. SVG chart optimization. Target: <2s initial load.

items.title: Agent Profile Deep-Dive Pages
items.description: /agents/:id page with full profile: run history, cost trend, delegation graph, feedback history.

items.title: Cost Anomaly Detection UI
items.description: Real-time banner when cost anomaly detected. Historical log. Threshold configuration.

items.title: Automated Sprint Retrospective
items.description: At sprint close, auto-generate retro from feedback + session data. Output to .agentforge/reviews/v4.8-retro.md.

items.title: Version Bump to 0.4.8
items.description: Update package.json, plugin.json, CHANGELOG, git tag.

successCriteria: All 17 dashboard sections display ONLY real data — zero hardcoded values
SPA routing: all pages accessible via direct URL and browser back/forward
SSE replaces ALL polling — no setInterval anywhere
Sprint tracker shows v4.8 items with real-time status
Org graph shows 6-team structure with 129 agents
Cost analytics shows real spend broken down by model, agent, and time
Session history searchable, filterable, paginated with drill-down
npm start serves a fully functional data-driven dashboard

items.title: v5 Architecture RFC
items.description: Full RFC for v5 platform: multi-project support, plugin architecture, RBAC, workspace isolation.

items.title: UI Framework Evaluation
items.description: Evaluate React, Svelte, SolidJS. Build identical PoC in each. Recommend one.

items.title: Enterprise Design System Spec
items.description: Define v5 design system: component library, tokens, WCAG 2.1 AA, responsive breakpoints.

items.title: Multi-Tenant Data Architecture
items.description: Design data isolation for multi-project. Evaluate SQLite per workspace vs PostgreSQL shared.

items.title: Plugin Architecture Prototype
items.description: Prototype plugin system: third-party agents, custom dashboard sections, webhook integrations.

items.title: Autonomous Agent Protocol v2
items.description: Design next-gen agent autonomy: self-assignment, resource requests, escalation protocol.

items.title: Embedding Search MVP
items.description: Working embedding-based search. Index all session history and feedback. Benchmark vs bag-of-words.

items.title: v5 Product Requirements Document
items.description: Comprehensive PRD: target users, use cases, competitive analysis, pricing, deployment models.
